content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

In what ratio must a shopkeeper mix sugar at Rs 30/kg and Rs 32.5/kg, so that by selling the mixture at Rs 34.1/kg he may gain 10%.

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Acc. to question 
SP of 1 kg of mixture = Rs 34.1 
Profit = 10% = 10/100 = 1/10 
SP = 1 + 10 = 11 unit 
11 units ->34.1 
1 unit -> 3.1 
10 unit -> 31 
We obtain the CP of the mixture Rs 31. 
To obtain the ratio use alligation method Hence, the ratio in which he mixed is 3:2 Related Articles:Practice Aliigation and Mixture Aptitude Quizzes.Problems on Mixture and Alligation | Set 2.
